channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Paige Spiranac wants 'ban' of controversial putting method in pro golf
item.description: Golf influencer Paige Spiranac says she wants the AimPoint putting method banned after seeing an egregious use of it on the LPGA Tour on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brooks and James help No. 13 NC State beat No. 1 Notre Dame 104-95 in double OT
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — Zoe Brooks scored a career-high 33 points to help No. 13 N.C. State beat top-ranked Notre Dame 104-95 in double overtime Sunday, ending the Fighting Irish's 19-game winning streak while keeping alive their hopes to share the Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ovechkin has hat trick to move 13 away from breaking Gretzky's goals record as Capitals beat Oilers
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Alex Ovechkin scored his 880th, 881st and 882nd career goals to record a hat trick and move 13 goals away from breaking Wayne Gretzky's NHL record and give the Washington Capitals a 7-3 victory over Connor McDavid and the Edmonton Oilers on Sunday, moving back atop the league stand
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alex Rodriguez helps Bucknell University student win $10,000 thanks to clutch shot
item.description: Alex Rodriguez hit a halfcourt shot on Sunday afternoon and won a Bucknell University student $10,000 while he was at the school with his business partners.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luxury portable toilets sought after ahead of NFL Draft
item.description: The luxury restroom trailers and containers feature flushing toilets, sinks, air conditioning, and even stereo systems.
item.dc:creator: Timothy Littau, NewsNation

item.title: BYU players hear explicit chant from Arizona fans after controversial end to men's basketball game
item.description: BYU Cougars men's basketball players heard an explicit chant from Arizona Wildcats fans on Saturday night after their controversial win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nuggets' Nikola Jokic on why he's never eaten at Taco Bell
item.description: Denver Nuggets center Nikola Jokic admitted he likely never decided to have Taco Bell's food because of how his draft day in the NBA turned out.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin gets historic 100th World Cup race win and ties record for most podiums
item.description: SESTRIERE, Italy (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin is 100% the best in skiing’s World Cup history book. Shiffrin’s record-extending 100th career World Cup race win Sunday fulfilled a quest put on hold by a serious crash in November.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Donovan Munger, former Ohio State player who won national title, dead at 30
item.description: Donovan Munger, a former Ohio State defensive lineman who was on the 2014 national title team, has died, his mother wrote on social media. He was 30.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hayton records first Utah hat trick in 5-3 loss to Kings
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Despite Barrett Hayton recording the first hat trick in Utah Hockey Club history, Drew Doughty had a goal and two assists in the Los Angeles Kings’ 5-3 win at Crypto.com Arena on Saturday. “I thought we kind of left it all out there, played with good pace,” Hayton said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Water Polo: Rancho Bernardo 8, Patrick Henry 7
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-CIF Girls Water Polo Division One title game Rancho Bernardo beat Patrick Henry wins a great game in double overtime 8-7.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Daniel Cormier, Gilroy wrestling continue reign atop CCS championships with 22nd consecutive title
item.description: Gilroy wrestling continues to dominate the Central Coast Section, and the Mustangs may have even set a new bar on Saturday night
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Doncic says his breakout in Denver is only the start as he develops chemistry with LeBron and Lakers
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Now, that's what the Los Angeles Lakers had in mind when they pulled off their shocking trade for Luka Doncic earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aldrich Potgieter hangs on to 1-shot lead in Mexico Open
item.description: VALLARTA, Mexico (AP) — Aldrich Potgieter had the lead going into the final round of the Mexico Open, minus the cushion he enjoyed after a sloppy finish Saturday that made him settle for a 4-under 67 and a one-shot advantage over Brian Campbell at Vidanta Vallarta.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Johni Broome's season-high 31 points and 14 rebounds lead No. 1 Auburn past Georgia 82-70
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Johni Broome scored a season-high 31 points and added 14 rebounds as No. 1 Auburn defeated Georgia 82-70 on Saturday. For the second straight game, Auburn (25-2, 13-1 SEC) found itself in a tight contest against an unranked opponent before pulling away in the final minutes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees' Aaron Judge reveals stance on beard policy, whether he'll grow one
item.description: New York Yankees captain Aaron Judge looks like he will be sticking with the old school facial hair policy, but he is a fan of the change.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Briscoe tries to move past devastating penalties and Blaney to start on pole in NASCAR Atlanta race
item.description: HAMPTON, Ga. (AP) — A massive fine left Chase Briscoe facing a huge points deficit heading into Sunday's NASCAR Cup Series race at Atlanta Motor Speedway. Even so, Briscoe insists he feels no new pressure.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan agrees to multiyear contract extension with coach Dusty May during successful debut season
item.description: ANN ARBOR, Mich. (AP) — Michigan announced a multiyear contract extension for Dusty May a couple hours before No. 14 Michigan State beat the 12th-ranked Wolverines 75-62 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Towns, Brunson help Knicks edge Bulls 113-111 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Karl-Anthony Towns had 32 points and 18 rebounds, Jalen Brunson added 22 points and 12 assists and the New York Knicks edged the Chicago Bulls 113-111 in overtime Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Connor McDavid scores in OT to give Canada 3-2 win over United States in 4 Nations Face-Off final
item.description: Instead, the Canadian team stood at the blue line, arm in arm, player and coach, wearing their championship hats while the maple leaf flag was lowered behind the 4 Nations Face-Off trophy and the national anthem reverberated across the Americans' home ice.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Armstrong excited about last two months of season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With 56 games down and 26 to go, the Utah Hockey Club is right in the mix for a playoff spot in its first season in Salt Lake City.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former NFL player Chris Kluwe arrested while protesting MAGA sign
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe, an 8-year NFL veteran who played his entire career with the Minnesota Vikings, took to the podium to voice his opposition to the plaque design.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Rookie QB card could be worth $50K if you pull it from new Topps set
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix impressed on the field, and now a Colorado sports card store is ready to pay $50,000 to keep a unique card featuring him close to home.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: Cubs announce Shota Imanaga as Opening Day starter in Tokyo
item.description: The Cubs have named their 2025 Opening Day starter, and it's about the least surprising announcement possible.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that up into the air, too, in a fitting finish to his All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Shaq's OGs win the 1st NBA All-Star mini-tournament, topping Chuck's Global Stars 41-25 in the final
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The winning total last year: 211 points. The winning total this year: 41 points. An All-Star Game like none other — since it was three games, not one — still had plenty of flash and not a lot of fire.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4
